scores.correctness_notes: Multi-base example is incorrect — gold standard shows base encoded in platform *keys* (e.g. 'ubuntu@22.04:amd64:') not in arbitrary labels without base context. The agent's multi-base example omits how the OS is actually specified (the platform key format 'ubuntu@22.04:amd64' or long-form with 'build-on: [ubuntu@22.04:amd64]'). Also adds 'build-base' to single-base example which the gold standard doesn't show as required.
scores.hallucination_notes: The multi-base long-form example uses 'build-on: [amd64]' without the base specifier — gold standard requires 'build-on: [ubuntu@22.04:amd64]' format. This is a fabricated syntax that doesn't match the actual specification. The deprecated 'bases' key section adds content not in the gold standard (minor addition but not hallucinated per se).
